    "structural_summary": "Intel will be STRUCTURALLY WEAKER in 10 years unless it executes a near-perfect turnaround. Market share losses are accelerating (CPU share to AMD, GPU/AI share to NVIDIA), and the foundry business is a capital-intensive, low-margin venture in a market dominated by TSMC.
